---
title: "ME/CFS — A Comprehensive Medical Documentation"
---

## Myalgic Encephalomyelitis / Chronic Fatigue Syndrome

Welcome. This website presents a comprehensive medical documentation of ME/CFS — a severe, chronic, multi-system neuroimmune disease affecting an estimated 0.89% to 2.5% of the global population.

The content spans five parts:

- **Part I — Clinical Presentation:** Core and additional symptoms, diagnostic criteria, disease course
- **Part II — Pathophysiology:** Energy metabolism, immune dysfunction, neurological, endocrine, cardiovascular, gut-microbiome, integrative models
- **Part III — Treatment:** Symptom management, medications, supplements, lifestyle interventions, emerging therapies, integrative approaches
- **Part IV — Research Evidence:** Biomarker research, clinical trials, mechanistic studies, epidemiology, controversies, translational findings
- **Part V — Quantitative Modeling:** Mathematical models of disease dynamics using ordinary differential equations

### Navigating This Document

Use the **sidebar** to browse chapters and sections. Each page has its own table of contents for in-page navigation. Use the **search** bar to find specific topics.

### About This Work

- **Author:** Ing. Yannick Loth, M.Sc. (Management)
- **License:** [Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)
- **DOI:** [10.5281/zenodo.19627450](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19627450)
- **Methodology:** Structured epistemic classification system — achievements, hypotheses, speculations, predictions, warnings, and recommendations

::: {.callout-warning}
## Medical Disclaimer

This documentation represents literature synthesis, **not clinical advice**. All treatment decisions must be made in consultation with qualified healthcare providers.
:::
